violations.description: Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. -No vent hood over the stove top in the back used for cooking.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. -Condensation in the walk in cooler drains into a bucket.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. -Drains from the bar lines drain into the handwash sink.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Acoustic ceiling tiles in the kitchen.
Installed, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. -Stove in back area is not under a vent hood.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. -Refrigeration unit in the walk in cooler drains into a bucket.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. -Drain for the drink dispenser behind the bar drains into the hand wash sink.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Acoustic ceiling tiles in the front kitchen area.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Walls and ceiling in the walk in cooler back by the refrigeration unit is in poor shape.
Installed, maintained (1 pt deducted)
